text.title: API Rate Limiting Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-rate-limiting artefact.

step.name: pick-key-source
step.action: Map auth scheme to limiter key: jwt → sub claim; session → uid; api-key → key_id; oauth2 → client_id.

step.name: pick-algorithm
step.action: Sliding-window for fairness; token-bucket for burst tolerance; leaky-bucket for smoothing. Avoid fixed-window for public APIs (boundary spikes).

step.name: size-quotas
step.action: Set per_second + per_minute + per_hour per tier; sustained < backend capacity / tier-fraction.

step.name: wire-429-envelope
step.action: Issue type URI for rate-limited; set Retry-After in middleware; align body to RFC 7807.

step.name: instrument-and-ship
step.action: Emit metrics_emitted; add alert on reject_rate > 1% per tier. Emit RL-* artefact.
